text:
Jikono (ジコーノ, Jikōno) Hunter × Hunter Hunter Association Official Issue: Hunter's Guide; Character & World Official Databook (pg. 204) is a player of the Greed Island game. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 14, Chapter 133 

Appearance

Jikono has fair hair and wears a short-sleeve shirt, plain pants, shoes, and a bracelet over his right wrist. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Jikono is one of the players who wants to steal Gon and Killua's first specified slot card "Sword of Truth" in Antokiba. 

Eventually, a grey dot appears next to his name in Gon's book, indicating that he has either left the game or passed away. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 158 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Due to being able to access Greed Island, Jikono is capable of utilizing Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Though Jikono's name is technically given in the manga through Gon's Greed Island binder, the correspondence between the character and his name is only provided in the Hunter's Guide databook.
